73601.subject: The Daily Degen - May 25th, 2026
73601.sender: The Daily Degen from The Daily Degen <thedailydegen@substack.com>
73601.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-may-25th-2026

Happy Monday dear frogs! And Happy Memorial Day!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.658T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $717.54
Gold: $4,569.30
Silver: $77.95
Oil (WTI): $90.30
US 10Y Treasury: 4.558%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 40
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
The Mantle/Bybit ecosystem continues to heat up good anons!
Some noteworthy items include:
-The massive success of tokenized equities on the network via @xStocksFi…
-@Infinit_Labs surpassing $30M in (TVF) Total Value Facilitated…
-Ongoing success in the Fintech sector, especially via @UR_Global…
-Continued growth of the Mantle defi ecosystem and @mETHProtocol…
-All sorts of cool new projects launching…
-AND… Mantle’s ongoing work in the RWA sector - which has been a massive focus as of late!
If you want to learn more, check out:
The Mantle State Of Mind livestream that aired on Friday (see below), and…
The great new interview with Mantle’s @emilyRioFreeman embedded below that! (just click the tweet to watch it in full!)
Check them out and as always make sure to follow Mantle on Twitter/X for more updates [ https://substack.com/redirect/36d8fa7f-5882-4b8e-88b9-e741caaf92c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and stay tuned as we continue shining a light on all the cool things they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly green today. Fastest-growing chains on the weekly with at least $10M TVL are Harmony, ZIGChain, and Near. 
Protocols are also mostly green. Fastest-growing protocols on the weekly with at least $10M TVL are Arkis (leveraged-farming on Hyperliquid and ETH Mainnet), Valdora Finance (liquid-staking protocol on ZIGChain), and Maya Protocol (cross-chain bridge).

New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project called @AquaFluxPro has been added to @DefiLlama, categorized as a yield protocol on Pharos. Twitter bio states “AquaFlux is a structured RWA protocol that unlocks RWA composability and yields through its Tri-Token model. 🌊 #DeFi #RWA #TriToken”. Followed by 3 of our mutuals. 
-New project called @BTCDOfficial has been added to @DefiLlama, ca

73600.subject: 🟪 Laze against the machines
73600.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3f889764-4c4c-426b-b0fe-da4071761d08/BD-Banner-Sponsor_Template.png?t=1779483553)
Follow image link: (https://ore.supply/)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/2def7e04-5c6f-4672-ab58-c005b2631be6/Quote_template_-_Breakdown_NL.png?t=1779484523)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7308cd4b-18ac-4037-9514-83e1f7bdcd8d/image.png?t=1779484330)
Caption: 

# **Laze against the machines**

In 2023, ChatGPT was found to take it easy over the holidays. 

Given two identical prompts, the large-language model returned [significantly shorter answers](https://x.com/RobLynch99/status/1734278713762549970?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1734278713762549970%7Ctwgr%5E4a2ddf698427f5279842b4c1b7084b2a2e220e81%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwccftech.com%2Fa-statistically-significant-test-proves-that-openai-gpt-4-turbo-is-particularly-lazy-over-the-winter-breaks%2F) when it believed it was the month of December rather than May.

It can only have learned that behavior from its training data, where it noticed that humans make less effort in December. So, to appear more human, it did, too. 

Anthropic’s Claude has similarly [been accused](https://x.com/nearcyan/status/1829674215492161569?s=20) of working less in summer — it must have noticed that people named _Claude_ tend to spend August not working in the south of France.

It’s very civilized of them. Humanizing, even.

Sadly, this no longer appears to be the case: agentic AI has turned LLMs into workaholics.

Where the chatbots of 2023 tried only to mimic the behavior they saw in their training data, the agents of 2026 are optimized for quantitative benchmarks: task completion, coding accuracy, error recovery, multi-turn reliability.

Agents will burn as many tokens as they have to, for as long as they have to, to complete whatever work we give them.

Unfortunately, this creates more work for people, not less. 

A [HBR study](https://hbr.org/2026/02/ai-doesnt-reduce-work-it-intensifies-it) found that employees using agentic AI “worked at a faster pace, took on a broader scope of tasks, and extended work into more hours of the day.”

Moments that once provided natural breaks to the day — lunch, waiting for a file to load, a meeting that didn’t require their attention — are now filled with prompting and answering agents.

The result is “a workday with fewer natural pauses and a more continuous involvement with work.” Agents, the study concludes, cause work “to spill into evenings or early mornings.”

And holidays.

It’s not just AI that’s blurring the boundaries between work and non-work. Crypto is doing it, too, by making markets 24

🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Market sentiment has dipped into "Extreme Fear" despite landmark institutional breakthroughs. Strategic Bitcoin disclosures from SpaceX and major regulatory shifts from the White House define a high-stakes 24 hours for the global digital asset ecosystem. 🚀SpaceX Discloses 18,712 BTC Holdings in New SEC Filing In a major filing ahead of its anticipated IPO, SpaceX revealed it holds over 18,700 Bitcoin, surpassing Tesla’s current reserves. The disclosure positions the aerospace giant as one of the world's most significant corporate BTC treasury holders. Read full story 🚫Indonesia Blocks Polymarket Amid National Gambling Crackdown Indonesia’s Ministry of Communication and Digital has restricted access to the decentralized prediction platform Polymarket, classifying it as illegal online gambling. The move follows a viral contract speculating on the country’s presidency. See details 🏛️Trump Issues Executive Order to Streamline Crypto Banking Access A new executive order from Donald Trump directs federal regulators to review and open federal payment rails to compliant digital asset firms. The order mandates a 90-day review period to identify and remove barriers to institutional banking partnerships. Read full story 🌍Tether Partners with Georgia for GELT Stablecoin Launch Tether has announced the launch of "GELT," a stablecoin pegged to the Georgian lari, with full backing from the Georgian government. The project aims to integrate blockchain-based programmable payments into the nation’s core financial infrastructure. See details 🛡️Ethereum Upgrade "Hegota" to Feature Native Protocol Privacy Developers have proposed EIP-8182 for Ethereum’s upcoming Hegota upgrade, introducing native private transfers for ETH and ERC-20 tokens. The proposal seeks to solve liquidity fragmentation by integrating a shared protocol-managed shielded pool. Read full story 🤝SWIFT Directory Formally Recognizes Ripple Treasury Integration Ripple Treasury has been added to SWIFT’s Business Solutions Providers Directory as a certified partner for ISO 20022 compliance. This certification marks a pivotal moment for the institutional adoption of Ripple’s liquidity solutions within traditional banking. 73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

73231.subject: From a Cornell Lab to BlackRock. The Avalanche Story. | One Block Weekly #11
73231.body:
Hello,

Welcome back to One Block Weekly. One coin, one story.

While most blockchains were still arguing about speed, one quietly went and built a different kind of network altogether.

🏔️ Avalanche (AVAX)

Emin Gun Sirer is a Cornell University computer science professor who had been researching distributed systems long before most people knew what a blockchain was.

In 2018, his team published a whitepaper introducing a new consensus mechanism, a way for a network to agree on what is true, that was faster and more scalable than anything Bitcoin or Ethereum used. They called it Avalanche.

Ava Labs was founded to build a blockchain around it. Avalanche launched its mainnet in September 2020, raised $230 million in a public token sale in 48 hours, and immediately positioned itself as the platform serious institutions would eventually choose.

The pitch was simple: all the programmability of Ethereum, none of the congestion.

⚡ A Few Moments That Shaped Avalanche

2021 - AVAX surged over 2,700% in a single year, hitting an all-time high of around $147. Developers flooded in, and Avalanche briefly became the fourth largest blockchain by total value locked.

2022 - Avalanche partnered with Deloitte to build a disaster relief reimbursement platform for US government agencies. A blockchain landing a Big Four accounting firm and a government contract in the same deal was a first.

2023 - The subnet model gained traction. Major institutions, including financial firms and gaming companies, began launching their own custom blockchains, called subnets, built on top of Avalanche infrastructure.

2024 - BlackRock and other asset managers began tokenising real-world assets on Avalanche, bringing government bonds and funds onto the blockchain. Institutional adoption had moved from talk to action.

🔢 What Makes It Different

Avalanche finalises transactions in under two seconds, faster than almost any major blockchain. But the more interesting feature is subnets: custom blockchains that can be spun up within the Avalanche ecosystem, each with its own rules, validators, and token economics.

For institutions that want the benefits of blockchain without sharing space with memecoins and DeFi protocols, that is a compelling offer.

🤯 Three Weird Avalanche Facts

The founder once publicly exposed a flaw in a rival blockchain. Emin Gun Sirer identified and disclosed a critical vulnerability in Bitcoin's network years before Avalanche existed. He is one of the few people in crypto who arrived with an academic reputation already intact.

A major gaming subnet launched and went quiet. One of the highest profile early subnets was built for a blockchain gaming ecosystem. It launched with significant fanfare and struggled to find its audience, becoming an early lesson in the gap between institutional infrastructure and consumer adoption.

The whitepaper was published anonymously. The original Avalanche consensus paper was released und
